scene_title: I DE OUTUBRO ceu com 180 misseis

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: an overhead shot of a night sky seen from below with 180 ballistic missile trails crossing, and an ancient calendar foreground marking I DE OUTUBRO
subject.focal_point: the crimson-marked date on the parchment calendar
subject.secondary: Below, desaturated city illuminated by explosions
props: parchment calendar with date I DE OUTUBRO

composition.foreground: calendar and trails in vivid crimson-gold

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

in_scene_text.font_style: ornate Roman-numeral calligraphy in crimson ink
